data.title: Obagi Medical and Alpha Aesthetic Partners collaborate in ALOHA Program with Obagi MagIQ, the first Medspa partner chosen for innovation and education.
data.description: Alpha has been chosen as the inaugural Medspa platform partner due to their dedication to innovation, education, and overcoming obstacles. This partnership highlights Alpha's exceptional qualities and positions them as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Starbucks to report Q1 earnings of 59 cents per share on $9.65 billion revenue. Dividend yield at 2.57%, $2.48 annually. Investors eye $500 monthly return.
data.description: Starbucks Corporation is set to announce its first-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Jan. 28. Analysts predict the company will post a profit of 59 cents per share for the fourth quarter, a decrease from 69 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts is that quarterly revenue will reach $9.65 billion, surpassing last year's reported revenue of $9.4 billion. Mizuho analyst Nick Setyan has a Neutral rating on the stock and has increased the price target from $86 to $95. Starbucks currently offers an annual dividend yield of 2.57%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 62 cents per share ($2.48 annually). Investors may be interested in leveraging the dividend yield to generate a consistent $500 monthly income. To achieve this, they would need to... More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Spectral Capital projects 400% revenue growth at Telvantis in Q1 2026, with Jan 2026 revenue exceeding Q1 2025 by 4x.
data.description: In January 2026, Spectral Capital Corporation (OTCQB: FCCN) anticipates generating revenue that is four times higher than its total revenue for Q1 2025, based on unaudited data. The company, headquartered in Seattle, shared this information on January 27, 2026. This notable increase in revenue is attributed to the performance of its newly acquired subsidiary, Telvantis Voice Services Inc.

data.title: MARPAI, Inc. appoints Mimi Davis as President of MarpaiRx to spearhead strategic growth. Tampa, Fla. Jan 27, 2026.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on January 27th, 2026, Marpai, Inc. (OTCQX: MRAI), a prominent healthcare technology provider specializing in Pharmacy Benefit Management (PBM) and Third-Party Administration (TPA) services, revealed the appointment of Mimi Davis as President of MarpaiRx.
CARNEY SAYS HAD GOOD CONVERSATION WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP

data.title: ChemDAQ introduces SafeCide™ Personal Sampler for food processors to monitor PAA exposure in real-time. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: ChemDAQ unveiled the latest SafeCide™ Personal Sampler, offering food and beverage processors cutting-edge technology for monitoring disinfectant exposure in real-time to ensure safe working conditions. This development was revealed in Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026. As a top player in hazardous gas detection, ChemDAQ presented this innovation to aid in managing safe operating environments.

data.title: BioCT hosted third Legislative Breakfast virtually with CT officials, industry leaders to strengthen life sciences sector.
data.description: Yesterday, BioCT, Connecticut's life sciences trade organization, held its third annual Legislative Breakfast virtually. The event featured Governor Ned Lamont, U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal, and Department of Economic and Community Development Commissioner Daniel O'Keefe, along with Chairs of the Connecticut General Assembly's Bioscience Caucus and Prescription Drug Task Force. Other state and industry leaders also participated in the event.

data.title: Solen Software Group buys Cairn Applications Inc, specializes in waste hauling software. Deal closed Dec. 2025. Cairn has 350+ customers, 65k dumpsters, ~$150M annual commerce.
data.description: In December 2025, Solen Software Group revealed their acquisition of Cairn Applications Inc, a leading provider of cloud software specifically designed for the waste hauling sector. Founded in 2008 by James Moser, Cairn Applications offers SaaS solutions utilized by waste operators throughout the United States and Canada. The company serves a clientele of over 350 customers, overseeing in excess of 65,000 dumpsters and enabling nearly $150 million in annual transactions. This acquisition marks a significant move for Solen Software Group in solidifying its presence in the waste management industry.

data.title: PVH Corp. partners with OpenAI to enhance brand growth, integrating OpenAI's tech with Calvin Klein, TOMMY HILFIGER.
data.description: In New York, global fashion company PVH Corp. [NYSE: PVH] has revealed a partnership with OpenAI to leverage the strengths of both entities. By integrating OpenAI's technology with the renowned brands Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER under PVH, the collaboration aims to enhance innovation and uncover novel prospects within the company's operations worldwide. This move aligns with PVH's long-term growth strategy, the PVH+ Plan, and signifies a step towards utilizing custom AI solutions through OpenAI to drive advancements throughout the entire value chain. The collaboration with OpenAI is set to reshape PVH's approach to operations and enable the development of cutting-edge capabilities.

data.title: Legitimate business calls are being mistakenly labeled as "spam risk," causing confusion among businesses. Download SharpenCX Buyers' Guide to learn more.
data.description: The Chief Operating Officer of SharpenCX, Tom Fisher, provides insights into the process of spam labeling and its implications for businesses. For those interested, the SharpenCX Buyers' Guide is available for download. This information was shared on January 27, 2026, in Indianapolis. Email spam was once considered a significant issue, with a growing awareness of its impact on businesses.

data.title: CACI awarded $250 million task order to enhance U.S. Army's spectrum dominance and readiness with Next-Gen Electronic Warfare.
data.description: CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) in Reston, Virginia has recently secured a significant five-year task order worth up to $250 million. The contract aims to improve spectrum dominance for the U.S. Army Capability Program Executive – Intelligence, Electronic Warfare & Sensors (CPE IEW&S). President John Mengucci highlighted CACI's commitment to investing in innovative, software-defined EW solutions to outsmart adversaries and enable swift decision-making.

data.title: Assurant (NYSE: AIZ) launches F&I On Demand™ to help auto dealerships with personnel shortages in F&I departments.
data.description: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a renowned global protection company, has introduced F&I On Demand™, a virtual staffing service to support auto dealerships facing shortages in finance and insurance (F&I) departments. This innovative solution aims to assist dealerships grappling with hiring, training, and staffing issues. As a trusted partner to leading brands, Assurant protects and serves connected devices, homes, and automobiles worldwide. F&I On Demand is a patent-pending initiative launched to address personnel gaps within the industry.

data.title: Hyperfine's Swoop® System advances stroke detection via portable MRI, showing strong clinical results.
data.description: In Guilford, Connecticut, recent findings have revealed compelling support for implementing AI-driven portable MRI technology for identifying strokes across various clinical environments, notably within emergency departments.

data.title: Stratasys partners with PostProcess to simplify additive manufacturing with new program, agreement announced.
data.description: In Minnetonka, Minnesota, and Rehovot, Israel, Stratasys revealed the introduction of its Post Processing Partnership Program, aiming to streamline customer access to verified post-processing solutions in additive manufacturing workflows. Through this strategic initiative, users can easily integrate end-to-end solutions. In conjunction with the program's debut, Stratasys disclosed a fresh commercial partnership with PostProcess Technologies, a renowned provider of automated and smart post-printing solutions. As part of this collaboration, Stratasys customers can expect enhanced efficiencies in their additive manufacturing processes. This move solidifies Stratasys' commitment to optimizing the additive manufacturing experience for their clients.

data.title: Lüt partners with Safe Harbor to provide compliant closed-loop payments for high-risk industries, including cannabis.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Lüt, a financial ecosystem focused on accessibility and growth, has unveiled a groundbreaking partnership with Safe Harbor, a top financial services provider. This collaboration aims to tackle a major issue in the cannabis sector: ensuring secure and compliant payments. Lüt's innovative closed-loop digital payment platform, designed for high-risk industries like cannabis, will benefit from Safe Harbor's expertise. This partnership will position Lüt as a Safe Harbor Advantage Partner, addressing the persistent payment challenges faced by the cannabis industry.

data.title: Armstrong World Industries to release Q4 and full-year 2025 results on Feb. 24, with conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Armstrong World Industries, Inc., a prominent company on the NYSE with the ticker symbol AWI, known for its innovative interior and exterior architectural solutions such as ceilings and metal applications, is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The disclosure is scheduled for Tuesday, February 24, before the market opens. Following this release, a conference call will be held at 10:00 a.m. ET to provide insights into these results. The call will also be webcast live along with a presentation.

data.title: Arch Painting® predicts that neutrals will be popular in commercial painting for 2026, with Pantone's Cloud Dancer and Sherwin Williams' Universal Khaki leading the trend.
data.description: In WOBURN, Massachusetts, Arch Painting®, a top provider of commercial paint contracting services nationwide, revealed the latest painting trends favored by its commercial clients and offered insights for 2026. Neutral tones are making a comeback as evidenced by Cloud Dancer being named Pantone's color of the year, a calm off-white shade, and Sherwin Williams designating Universal Khaki as the color of the year - a cozy, earthy neutral tone. Arch Painting has noted a rise in demand for these colors among its customers.
